headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 16, 2026**
article:
The Washington Nationals secured a thrilling 8-7 victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Marcell Ozuna leading the charge at the plate. Ozuna hit a home run and drove in three runs, while Clayton Beeter earned the win in relief.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their teams' lineups. The Washington Nationals' Ken Waldichuk has been transferred to the 60-day injured list due to left forearm tightness. The Texas Rangers have placed Chris Martin on the 15-day injured list with right shoulder impingement, while Luis Curvelo is also on the 15-day injured list with a right biceps strain. Cody Bradford has been moved to the 60-day injured list for left elbow surgery rehab. The New York Mets have placed Jared Young on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 13, 2026, with a left meniscus tear.

Several trades and roster moves have taken place around the league. The Los Angeles Dodgers acquired right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott from the Baltimore Orioles in exchange for right-handed pitcher Axel Perez. The New York Mets traded left-hander Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash. The Milwaukee Brewers acquired right-hander Junior Fernández from the Arizona Diamondbacks.

top_news.title: **Nationals Edge Pirates in Thrilling 8-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a hard-fought 8-7 win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Marcell Ozuna leading the charge at the plate. Ozuna hit a home run and drove in three runs, while Clayton Beeter earned the win in relief.

top_news.title: **Giants Shut Out Reds 3-0**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a shutout victory over the Cincinnati Reds, with Landen Roupp pitching 6.0 innings of scoreless baseball, striking out 6 batters and allowing just 2 walks. Jung Hoo Lee led the Giants' offense with 3 hits and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Royals Fall Short in Thrilling 9-10 Loss to Tigers**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Kansas City Royals 9-10 in a closely contested game. Salvador Perez led the Royals' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Angels Blast Past Yankees 11-4**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels dominated the New York Yankees, securing an 11-4 victory. Jo Adell led the Angels' offense with a grand slam and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals' Waldichuk Shifted to 60-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Washington Nationals left-hander Ken Waldichuk has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to left forearm tightness.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire RHP Chayce McDermott in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers have made a move to bolster their pitching staff, acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott from the Baltimore Orioles in exchange for right-handed pitcher Axel Perez.
